description.purpose: Test a minimal successful burger ordering flow
description.relevant_policies: Collect the customer's name, burger, quantity, and pickup time before placing the order
description.notes: Single use case for a simple burger domain

user_scenario.persona: Friendly and concise. You know exactly what you want and appreciate a quick confirmation.

instructions.reason_for_call: You want to place a pickup order for lunch.
instructions.task_instructions: Ask the agent to place an order for 1 Classic Burger for pickup at 12:30 PM under the name Alex Parker. Wait for confirmation that the order was placed.

ticket: Place a pickup order for 1 Classic Burger at 12:30 PM under the name Alex Parker.

actions.name: place_order
actions.info: Create the burger order with the requested details

nl_assertions: The agent confirms that the burger order was placed successfully
